/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ahfl_property_smv_tests.dir/unit/property/smv_syntax.cpp.o -o ahfl_property_smv_tests  ../src/tooling/testing/libahfl_tooling_testing.a
